title: Tools
subtitle: Utilities for viewing, anonymizing, converting, and managing medical imaging data.

viewer.title: Viewer
viewer.description: Upload DICOM files, browse studies, and open the medical image viewer with advanced visualization tools.

anonymizer.title: Anonymizer
anonymizer.description: Remove identifying information (owner & patient) from DICOM files for research and sharing.

outputFormat.label: Output Format
outputFormat.dicom_zip_desc: Anonymized DICOM files in ZIP archive
outputFormat.nifti_bids_desc: NIfTI volumes + JSON sidecars in BIDS folder structure
outputFormat.png_bids_desc: PNG slices + JSON sidecars in BIDS folder structure

anonymizer.bidsInfo: BIDS output requires a complete study. Identifying information is removed before conversion. Technical parameters are preserved.

converter.title: Converter
converter.description: Convert DICOM files to other formats like JPEG, PNG, or NIfTI.

compressor.title: Compressor
compressor.description: Archive DICOM studies into 7z format for efficient storage and transfer.

tagEditor.title: Tag Editor
tagEditor.description: View and edit DICOM metadata tags for studies and images.
